description: A reference private-credit asset referencing short-tenor trade receivables originated from investment-grade commercial buyers. Disclosures emphasize invoice eligibility, collection timing, and reserve coverage.

docs.label: Receivables schedule
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Shows illustrative invoice aging, obligor mix, and eligibility criteria.

docs.label: Servicer controls
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Describes reference collection and reconciliation controls.

docs.label: Reserve memo
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Summarizes reserve assumptions and loss-coverage mechanics.
